overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets under elevated highways, futuristic traffic, and dense urban architecture with large digital billboards. The character walks along a covered sidewalk, crosses a multi-lane intersection, and continues through a commercial district with towering buildings.

events.description: pedestrian in red pants passes close to camera in foreground
rain becomes visibly heavier, creating streaks in the light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk under the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: person in red pants and dark jacket walking toward camera and passing by
person in white top walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway overhead with green neon strip lighting
tall black pole with overhead light illuminating the sidewalk
metal railing with yellow and black posts separating sidewalk from street
large illuminated advertisement on building facade showing commercial content

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath a massive concrete overpass, with street lamps casting pools of light. The camera passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction while futuristic cars drive by on the left. Digital billboards glow in the distance against the dark urban backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with vending stalls approaching intersection

events.description: futuristic yellow sports car drives past on the street followed by a purple vehicle
pedestrian with purple hair and white top passes close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, approaching an intersection with increasing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow sports car driving past on the wet street
person with distinctive purple hair carrying a bag walking past the camera

entered.detail: blue and orange illuminated vending machines or automated food stalls
green illuminated directional signs with Japanese text hanging from the overpass

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the overpass, the scene features illuminated vending stalls on the right and increasingly busy traffic on the left. Overhead green traffic signs indicate directions in Japanese. The character passes a pedestrian with purple hair while futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet asphalt.

events.description: character stops at curb to wait for passing traffic before crossing
character crosses the multi-lane street between moving futuristic vehicles

agents.ego_description: stopping at the curb to judge traffic, then crossing the wide intersection through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan stopped or moving slowly at the intersection
white car driving through the intersection with headlights on

entered.detail: yellow and white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing on the road
tall pole with traffic signals and overhead street light at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the curb of a wide intersection, waiting for a gap in the moderate flow of futuristic traffic. After pausing, they cross the multi-lane road marked with yellow crosswalk lines, moving from the sheltered overpass area into the open intersection with traffic lights and moving vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial street with high-rise neon signage

events.description: character looks upward at the towering buildings while continuing to walk
moving from under overpass into open commercial district with full building views

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk and looking up at the towering buildings covered in neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the sidewalk near the building entrance

entered.detail: multi-story concrete building with vertical windows and green interior lighting
building facade covered in large digital advertisements and bright neon signs
elevated walkway connecting buildings with illuminated stairs
long orange barrier running along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Now on the opposite side of the intersection, the character walks past a tall office building with green-lit windows and orange construction barriers. The camera pans up to reveal towering structures covered in massive digital billboards and neon signage. The environment opens up to show the full scale of the cyberpunk cityscape with a pedestrian overpass visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sheltered gloom of a concrete overpass into the expansive, neon-drenched heart of a cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by moving along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath a massive overpass, passing pedestrians and futuristic cars while distant digital billboards glow against the dark urban backdrop. As the camera continues forward, the environment becomes more crowded with illuminated vending stalls and green Japanese traffic signs appearing overhead. The scene then shifts as the character pauses at a curb before crossing a wide, multi-lane intersection marked with yellow lines, moving from the covered shelter into the open air of the city. Finally, the camera passes a green-lit office building and orange construction barriers, panning upward to reveal a towering cityscape of massive digital billboards and a distant pedestrian overpass.
